problem_statement: The document addresses how AI can enhance code review of increasingly complex software while managing the risks AI-assisted/AI-generated code introduces, arguing traditional manual review is time-consuming and inconsistent yet human oversight remains necessary.
insufficiency_evidence: "traditional manual code review methods are time-consuming and prone to inconsistency"; AI tools "may generate technically correct recommendations that fail to consider the broader application or project context" and "false positives can disrupt workflow and erode trust"
solution_mechanisms: AI as collaborative partner augmenting human review
notes: Short position/synthesis paper (essay-style, University of the Cumberlands); light on empirical detail and heavily self-cites (Batte 2024).
